---
title: "Do Psychedelics Mimic Psychosis? Perspectives on Similarities and Differences from Individuals with Lived Experience of Psychosis and Psychedelics"
primary_author: Haley Maria Dourron
pres_group: publications
date: '2026-03-17'
description: "Haley Maria Dourron, Melissa K Bradley, Heith Copes, Christopher R Nicholas, Jessica A Turner, Gaige Allen-Clark, Peter S Hendricks"
page-layout: full
---

Dourron, H.M., Bradley, M.K., Copes, H. et al. Do Psychedelics Mimic Psychosis? Perspectives on Similarities and Differences from Individuals with Lived Experience of Psychosis and Psychedelics. Int J Ment Health Addiction (2026). https://doi.org/10.1007/s11469-026-01649-9
